details.correction_reason: User identified that TASK-020 report's agent-by-agent activity log incorrectly attributed all single-Codex-CLI invocation activity (web search + README read + ad poster prompt synthesis + image generation + file save) to Researcher. Per the corrected authority docs (researcher.md v1.6, analyst.md v3.1, tool-permissions.md v1.10, researcher-procedure-ko.md v1.1), Researcher activity is limited to information gathering (web search, document fetch, snippet/Research Summary). Generation outputs (ad poster prompt, image, deliverable files) belong to Analyst.

analyst_activity: ad poster prompt synthesis from research findings
poster.png file save and copy to download/
correct_attribution_for_task_020.runtime_note: Both activities happened inside a single Codex CLI invocation, but role attribution splits along information-gathering vs creative-output lines.
